hermes.goal: Beat buy-and-hold (positive alpha vs BTC) while keeping max drawdown under 15% and never risking the mandate on a single trade — capital preservation first. Near-term: prove a sustained, fee-aware, positive out-of-sample edge on the paper trainer over ~90 days before scaling any live capital; grow the live account only on demonstrated alpha.

brain.commentary: All four crypto signals are flat with negative composites and modest to low conviction, indicating weak edge. Beta > 1 for BTC, ETH and SOL and elevated vol (especially ETH/SOL) raise draw‑down risk. LTC shows the most fragile profile (deep negative alpha and composite, lowest base conviction). Accordingly we adopt a defensive stance, lower the overall risk multiplier, and trim exposure on the riskier legs while keeping a modest tilt toward SOL, the least fragile among the set.
